feedback.description: We value your suggestions to make JUST Social better.

community.title: Discover Our Community Members
community.description: Modern member cards that highlight people on the platform and surface their key details at a glance.
community.fallbackBio: Passionate about learning and sharing skills with the community.
community.loadError: Unable to load community members right now. Please try again shortly.

signInHint: Sign in or create an account
subtitle: Swap Skills · Grow Together · Connect with the World

features.title: Empowering Meaningful Exchange
features.description: Everything you need to master new skills and share your expertise through a seamless, interactive experience.

feature.videoDesc: High-definition video calls optimized for remote teaching and real-time collaboration.
feature.chatDesc: Instant messaging with file sharing and code snippet support to keep the conversation flowing.
feature.workspaceDesc: Built-in whiteboard and code editor for hands-on learning and technical demonstrations.
feature.gamesDesc: Break the ice with integrated chess and other games while you wait or take a break.
feature.securityDesc: End-to-end encryption and robust privacy controls to ensure a safe learning environment.
feature.communityDesc: Connect with experts and enthusiasts from across the globe in seconds.

safety.title: Safe & Moderated by AI
safety.desc: Our platform takes immediate action against violators to ensure a safe learning environment using advanced AI moderation.

howItWorks.title: How it Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Not just for learning, but For Fun too!
howItWorks.description: Start video chatting with enthusiasts around the world. It's not just about exchanging skills—it's about making friends, having fun, and meeting new people! Connect in 3 simple steps.

step1.title: Sign Up
step1.desc: Register your free account to access features.

step2.title: Click Start
step2.desc: Hit the start button to quickly match with someone.

step3.title: Start Talking
step3.desc: Turn on your camera and microphone, chat and start exchanging skills!

cta.title: Ready to your skillest? Upgrade your skillest now
cta.description: Join a community where knowledge is the currency. Swap what you know for what you want to learn. No fees, no barriers, just pure growth.

footer.tagline: Empowering the next generation of lifelong learners through Peer-to-Peer skill exchange and global collaboration.
